title: zanthoxylum ternatum
intro: Zanthoxylum ternatum, also known as Korean prickly ash or Japanese prickly ash, is a plant species in the family Rutaceae, native to East Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to relieve pain, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum ternatum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve circulation, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by infusing the leaves, bark, or roots in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
